name: coTfsLssAddMasterResponseActivateBitTiming
title: coTfsLssAddMasterResponseActivateBitTiming
description: This function adds a single LSS Master request wait condition to the internal list of LSS Master request wait conditions.

parameters.name: switchDelay
parameters.description: Duration (in ms) of the two periods of time to wait until the bit timing parameters switch is done (first period) and before transmitting any CAN message with the new bit timing parameters after performing the switch (second period).
